'''Airten''' was a light-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]],<ref name="JKTCG" /> the main security force of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]<ref name="Wing Guard DB">{{DB|organization|bespinwingguard|Wing Guard}}</ref> on the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]],<ref name="Bespin DB">{{DB|location|bespin|Bespin}}</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> A burly Wing Guard member,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|16|Airten, Sergeant}}</ref> his large size prevented him from becoming a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]; however, Airten's nonstandard build did not matter to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]],<ref name="JKTCG" /> the [[City/Legends|city's]] [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]].<ref name="Lando DB">{{DB|character|landocalrissian|Calrissian, Lando}}</ref> Airten was a sympathizer of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He wore the standard uniform for the Bespin Wing Guard. He also wielded a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sergeant Airten first appeared on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
